sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Sun Life acquires remaining BGO stake for over $1B
feed.summary: Sun Life Financial Services has acquired the remaining 44% stake in Miami Beach-based BGO for $1.2 billion, bringing its total ownership to 100%. This acquisition is part of a larger strategy to merge BGO with Bell Partners, a multifamily investment firm, for an additional $350 million, anticipating significant growth in the multifamily sector. Sun Life's total spend on these transactions amounts to at least $1.6 billion, including a separate acquisition of the remaining stake in Crescent Capital Group.

feed.title: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals’ Stock Jumps After New Drug Approval
feed.summary: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: RYTM) saw its stock jump over 10% following the FDA's expanded approval of its obesity treatment, Imcivree, for patients aged four and above with acquired hypothalamic obesity. This regulatory success has bolstered investor confidence, positioning the company for significant growth and diversification despite some financial challenges. Analysts maintain a positive outlook, anticipating further market expansion, particularly with strategic moves into Europe.

feed.title: SES AI Corp (NYSE: SES) RSU vesting triggers 60,452-share tax withholding
feed.summary: SES AI Corp's Chief Legal Officer, Kyle Pilkington, had 60,452 shares of Class A Common Stock withheld for tax obligations related to vesting restricted stock units (RSUs). This transaction, valued at $0.9873 per share, was a routine tax withholding and not a market sale. After this, Pilkington directly holds 719,751 Class A shares, including 435,453 shares still subject to forfeiture until they vest.

The current price is listed as $45.190, but there is no specific data provided for growth, profitability, or efficiency.

feed.title: Skye Bioscience, Inc. advances nimacimab dosing to target CB1 pathway
feed.summary: Skye Bioscience, Inc. is progressing with the development of nimacimab, aiming to optimize its dosing and exposure to maximize therapeutic potential, especially for targeting CB1 pathways. Early results from its CBeyond study, where nimacimab was combined with semaglutide, suggest that higher exposure levels might be necessary to engage peripheral CB1 targets more effectively. The company is evaluating nimacimab's clinical prospects and will report its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on March 10, 2026.

feed.title: SFL (NYSE: SFL) director discloses option grants and indirect shares
feed.summary: SFL Corp Ltd. director Homan-Russell George William has disclosed his initial holdings, which include share options for a significant number of common shares with various exercise prices and expiration dates. He also indirectly owns 8,750 common shares through WHR Capital Ltd., a company he wholly owns. The disclosed information represents his beneficial ownership rather than recent market transactions.

feed.title: SiriusXM to Report First Quarter 2026 Operating and Financial Results
feed.summary: SiriusXM (NASDAQ: SIRI) is scheduled to release its first quarter 2026 operating and financial results on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will also host an investor conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Investors can access a live webcast of the call on the SiriusXM Investor Relations website or join by telephone.

feed.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust First Quarter 2026 Conference Call Scheduled for Wednesday, April 29th
feed.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (SEVN) announced its first quarter 2026 financial results will be released after the Nasdaq closes on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, featuring President and Chief Investment Officer Tom Lorenzini, Chief Financial Officer Matthew Brown, and Vice President Jared Lewis. A replay and webcast of the call will also be available for those unable to attend live.

feed.title: Prelim 2025 results show SDOT revenue $247M; 10-K filing delayed (SDOT)
feed.summary: Sadot Group Inc. (SDOT) announced a delay in filing its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, citing the need for additional time to compile and review disclosures. The company provided preliminary, unaudited 2025 financial estimates, indicating a significant revenue decline to $247 million from $701 million in 2024, and an operating loss of $14.0 million compared to an operating income of $6.2 million in the previous year. This decline is attributed primarily to insufficient working capital and delays in collecting receivables from its LATAM division, with management actively pursuing additional financing and reviewing strategic alternatives.

feed.title: Rayonier keeping its name after merger with PotlatchDeltic
feed.summary: Rayonier Inc. announced it will retain its name following its merger with PotlatchDeltic Corp., despite earlier plans to adopt a new name. The decision was made after considering both companies' rich history, brand equity, and market presence, concluding that keeping the Rayonier name, along with a refreshed logo, would best serve the combined entity. Rayonier CEO Mark McHugh stated this approach honors their history, leverages strong brand equity, and mitigates costs and confusion.

feed.title: Riverview shareholders get $0.02 a share cash dividend April 24
feed.summary: Riverview Bancorp (Nasdaq GSM: RVSB) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, consistent with the previous quarter. The dividend was approved on March 26, 2026, and is payable on April 24, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 13, 2026. As of December 31, 2025, Riverview reported $1.51 billion in assets and operates 17 branches.

feed.title: Sea Limited's Billion-Dollar Buyback Provides a Foundation Amid Consolidation
feed.summary: Sea Limited is in a consolidation phase following a period of significant share price weakness, with its stock trading near 52-week lows. A key component of investor confidence is a $1 billion share repurchase program. The company is also focusing on strategic AI integration to streamline operations and expanding its SeaMoney fintech division beyond the Shopee ecosystem to diversify revenue.

feed.title: Rising costs deepen 374Water (NASDAQ: SCWO) 2025 net loss and cash drain
feed.summary: 374Water (NASDAQ: SCWO) reported a significant widening of its net loss to $21.0 million in 2025 from $12.4 million the prior year, primarily due to a 58% increase in operating expenses to $18.8 million. The company's cash and cash equivalents also saw a sharp decline from $10.7 million to $3.2 million, highlighting a weakened liquidity position despite some commercial traction in PFAS destruction. Management plans to focus on disciplined capital allocation, scaling its AirSCWO platform, and building an Orlando waste destruction hub to address these financial challenges and drive future growth.

feed.title: Rezolute (RZLT) CFO adds 10,000 shares in open-market purchase
feed.summary: Rezolute, Inc.'s CFO, Daron Evans, purchased 10,000 common shares in an open-market transaction at $2.85 per share on March 30, 2026. This purchase brings his direct holdings to 414,462 common shares. The filing also details various indirect holdings through his spouse, minor children, and PoC Capital, LLC, for which he disclaims beneficial ownership except for his pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Invesco Exchange-Traded Fund Trust - Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Technology ETF announces Quarterly dividend, payable on March 27, 2026
feed.summary: Invesco Exchange-Traded Fund Trust - Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Technology ETF (RYT) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.0393 per share. This dividend is payable on March 27, 2026, with the ex-date and record date both set for March 23, 2026. The announcement was made on January 2, 2026, according to S&P Capital IQ.

feed.title: Insider sale: Satellogic (SATL) president trims stake by 9,499 shares
feed.summary: Satellogic President Matthew Tirman sold 9,499 shares of Class A Common Stock for $5.179 per share on March 30, 2026, totaling approximately $49,195. Following the transaction, Tirman still directly holds 154,184 shares, maintaining a substantial investment in the company. This open-market sale was reported via a Form 4 SEC filing and is deemed to have a neutral impact but negative sentiment for the company.

feed.title: SAJ SEC Filings - Saratoga Invtmt 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Saratoga Investment Corp. (SAJ) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K reports, crucial for investors and traders. Recent filings detail the issuance of new notes to refinance debt, private placement of senior unsecured notes, a shelf registration for various securities, and quarterly financial results. The article also highlights insider trading activity by the CEO and a new credit facility agreement.

feed.title: Seabridge Gold Lifts KSM Resource Estimates on Higher Metal Price Assumptions
feed.summary: Seabridge Gold has updated the mineral resource estimates for its KSM project by using higher metal price assumptions and updated cost parameters, resulting in significant increases in gold, copper, silver, and molybdenum resources. This move expands the project's economic envelope without altering the geological model and positions KSM more competitively for a potential joint venture with a Tier 1 partner. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates SEA as Neutral due to weak financial performance and bearish technical momentum despite the resource update.

feed.title: Ryerson hands merger integration and synergies to revamped leadership team
feed.summary: Ryerson (NYSE: RYZ) announced leadership team changes on March 31, 2026, to accelerate the strategic integration following its merger with Olympic Steel. Key appointments include Mark Silver as Executive Vice President and Chief Legal & Risk Officer, Frank Williams as Chief Information Officer, and Richard Manson leading synergy attainment and finance integration. These changes aim to enhance operational excellence, drive customer success, and maximize synergies from the merger, with a focus on enterprise risk, cybersecurity, technology, and benefits harmonization.

feed.title: RXT PE Ratio & Valuation, Is RXT Overvalued
feed.summary: Rackspace Technology Inc (RXT) is currently considered undervalued, with a fair price estimated between $3.42 and $3.70 compared to its current price of $1.00. The article analyzes RXT's Price-to-Sales (P/S), Price-to-Book (P/B), and Free Cash Flow (FCF) yield relative to its historical averages and competitors. Despite being undervalued by the relative valuation method, its P/S ratio is significantly above the industry average, which the analysis suggests might be unsustainable given its revenue growth.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Insulet ...
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Insulet Corporation on behalf of its investors. This investigation follows Insulet's disclosure of a voluntary Medical Device Correction for specific lots of its Omnipod® 5 Pods due to a manufacturing issue. After this news, Insulet's stock price dropped significantly, leading to the law firm's inquiry into possible unlawful business practices by the company's officers and/or directors.

feed.title: RYTM PE Ratio & Valuation, Is RYTM Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Inc (RYTM)'s valuation metrics, including its P/B ratio, FCF yield, and P/S ratio, to determine if the stock is overvalued. It concludes that RYTM is currently in the "Fair zone" with a forward P/S ratio of 27.10, relative to a five-year average of -12.69. The fair price range is estimated between $8.32 and $133.60, based on relative valuation methods, and its P/S ratio is noted to be significantly above the industry average but potentially sustainable due to robust revenue growth.

feed.title: Is Raymond James (RJF) Management Turnover Quietly Reshaping Its Long‑Term Wealth Strategy?
feed.summary: Raymond James recently appointed Kirk Bell as president of its Independent Contractor Division following Shannon Reid's resignation, effective April 1, 2026. This leadership change occurs as the firm deals with softer capital markets activity, relying on growth in asset management and private client revenues. While the appointment may not immediately alter capital markets trends, it highlights the firm's ongoing technology investments, such as its proprietary AI agent "Rai," which needs monitoring for its impact on margins.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) Short Interest Up 18.5% in March
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) saw a significant increase of 18.5% in short interest during March, reaching 12,428,708 shares, representing about 4.9% of shares sold short. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, the company exceeded revenue expectations and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30. Analyst sentiment remains mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $42.50, influenced by recent downgrades and price target reductions.

feed.title: Microsoft Reportedly Explores $7 Billion Texas Power Deal With Chevron, Engine No. 1 To Fuel AI Data Cent
feed.summary: Microsoft is reportedly in discussions with Chevron and Engine No. 1 for a $7 billion natural gas-fired power plant deal in West Texas. This initiative aims to secure a dedicated electricity supply to meet the soaring demand from its AI data centers, supporting platforms like Copilot and ChatGPT. Although no definitive agreement has been reached, the proposed plant could initially generate approximately 2,500 megawatts of electricity.

feed.title: Veralto: GlobalVision Acquisition To Expand AI Powered Packaging Compliance Solutions
feed.summary: Veralto has announced its acquisition of GlobalVision to strengthen its packaging workflow capabilities and expand its AI-driven quality and compliance solutions. This acquisition will integrate GlobalVision’s AI-augmented technology into Veralto's Esko business, aiming to help customers accelerate time-to-market and reduce packaging errors. GlobalVision has shown strong financial growth and the transaction is expected to be neutral to Veralto’s adjusted EPS in 2026 and accretive in 2027.

feed.title: Zero debt, $20M cash: Rail Vision grew 2025 revenue 14.4%
feed.summary: Rail Vision (RVSN) reported a 14.4% year-over-year revenue increase to $1.487 million for full-year 2025, with second-half revenue up 132% to $1.25 million. The company ended 2025 with approximately $20 million in cash and zero financial debt, while narrowing its GAAP net loss to $11.1 million from $30.7 million in 2024. Strategic moves included acquiring a 51% stake in Quantum Transportation and securing new commercial orders and pilots in various regions.

feed.title: [Form 4] REDWOOD TRUST INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: REDWOOD TRUST INC director Debora Horvath received 10,961.73 Deferred Stock Units, valued at $5.38 per share, as part of her director compensation. These units are 100% vested at grant, have no expiration date, and represent equity-based compensation without an immediate cash transaction. The transaction was reported on March 31, 2026, and is detailed in the SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: [Form 4] REDWOOD TRUST INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article details an insider trading activity for Redwood Trust Inc. (RWT), specifically a Form 4 filing. Director Greg H. Kubicek received 18,529.880 deferred stock units as part of his director compensation, which are 100% vested at grant and convertible to common shares at $5.38 per share. The transaction, dated March 31, 2026, increases his direct holdings of deferred stock units to the same amount.

feed.title: RGC Resources marks 328th straight quarterly cash dividend
feed.summary: RGC Resources (Nasdaq: RGCO) has declared its 328th consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $0.2175 per share, payable on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 17, 2026. This consistent payout highlights the company's long-standing financial stability and commitment to returning value to shareholders. The company also noted that forward-looking statements are subject to various risks, including gas prices, supply, geopolitical factors, and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Rezolve AI (RZLV) Is Down 7.4% After Hiking 2026 Guidance and Announcing Reward Loyalty Deal
feed.summary: Rezolve AI (RZLV) reported significant revenue growth for 2025 and raised its 2026 revenue guidance to US$360 million, supported by US$232 million in contracted revenue. The company also announced the acquisition of Reward Loyalty UK for US$230 million to expand its market presence. Despite these positive updates and aggressive growth targets for its AI platform, the stock was down 7.4%.

feed.title: Citigroup Raises Price Target for Range Resources (RRC) to $50
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Range Resources (RRC) to $50, maintaining a Neutral rating, which signifies a 16.28% increase from the previous target. This adjustment reflects a cautiously optimistic sentiment among analysts, as several other firms have also recently increased their price targets for RRC. Range Resources is a prominent exploration and production company focused on the Marcellus shale in Southwest Pennsylvania.

feed.title: Range Resources (RRC) SVP McDowell sells 8,250 shares, retains large stake
feed.summary: Range Resources' SVP & General Counsel, Erin W. McDowell, sold 8,250 shares of common stock at $48.00 per share in an open-market transaction. Following this sale, she still directly holds 84,451 shares and has indirect interests in an additional 68,504 unvested shares and 5,509 shares in a deferred compensation account. The transaction, reported via SEC Form 4, indicates a net sale of $396,000 worth of shares, but her total holdings demonstrate a continued significant stake in the company.

feed.title: Range Resources (NYSE: RRC) CFO granted 50,563 performance-based shares
feed.summary: Range Resources (NYSE: RRC) CFO Mark Scucchi was granted 50,563 performance-based shares of Common Stock valued at $47.65 per share on March 27, 2026. This award, compensation-related rather than a market purchase, was based on performance criteria from a March 2023 performance stock unit grant, with 120% vesting for TSR PSUs and 156.44% for Absolute Measure PSUs. Following this grant, Scucchi directly holds 731,851 shares, with additional indirect holdings in unvested stock, a 401k, and an IRA.

feed.title: RNAZ (RNAZ) delays 2025 Form 10-K after $25M preferred placement and acquisition
feed.summary: TransCode Therapeutics, Inc. (RNAZ) has delayed the filing of its 2025 Form 10-K, citing complex accounting requirements following several significant transactions on October 8, 2025. These include the acquisition of ABCJ, LLC, a $25 million private placement of Series B preferred stock, and the issuance of contingent value rights (CVRs). The company requires additional time to finalize valuations and accounting for various items like IPR&D, goodwill, and deferred taxes.

feed.title: B Riley Financial options imply 10.8% move in share price post-earnings
feed.summary: Options trading for B Riley Financial (RILY) suggests a potential 10.8% price movement after its upcoming earnings release, which translates to about a 79-cent change. This implied volatility is significantly higher than the company's historical median move of 4.3% over the past eight quarters post-earnings. The pre-earnings options volume indicates higher activity in calls compared to puts, with a ratio of 8:5.

feed.title: RIME SEC Filings - Algorhythm Holdings Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Algorhythm Holdings (NASDAQ: RIME) SEC filings, including annual 10-K, quarterly 10-Q, and material event 8-K reports, along with insider trading forms. StockTitan offers AI-powered summaries of these documents to help investors understand the company's financial health, strategic transformation into an AI logistics and distribution business (SemiCab), and capital market activities. Recent filings detail leadership changes, a registration statement for common stock resale and warrant shares, financial information for its acquired Indian subsidiary SMCB Solutions Private Limited, and a secured prepaid equity line with Streeterville Capital.

feed.title: Reitar Logtech (RITR) director discloses large Class A and B stakes
feed.summary: Reitar Logtech Holdings Ltd director Yiu Chun Yip has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing significant indirect holdings of 6,520,000 Class A ordinary shares and 3,260,000 Class B ordinary shares through Smart Wealthy Investment Limited. This filing establishes him as a major shareholder and director, but does not report any new purchases or sales. The disclosure provides transparency on his substantial beneficial ownership in the company.

feed.title: Nasdaq warns Reitar Logtech (Nasdaq: RITR) over sub-US$1.00 share price
feed.summary: Nasdaq has notified Reitar Logtech (RITR) that it is not in compliance with its listing rule due to its Class A ordinary shares trading below US$1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 calendar days, until September 22, 2026, to regain compliance by having its closing bid price at or above US$1.00 for at least 10 consecutive business days. Reitar Logtech's business operations are unaffected, and management plans to monitor the share price and may consider options like a reverse share split to meet Nasdaq's requirements.

feed.title: Reitar Logtech (RITR) swings to H1 2025 loss as revenue drops 71%
feed.summary: Reitar Logtech Holdings (RITR) reported a significant net loss of HK$42.9 million for the first half of fiscal year 2025, a sharp decline from a net income of HK$24.3 million in the prior year. This downturn was primarily due to a 71% drop in revenue to HK$55.5 million, as major construction projects neared completion, and operating expenses more than doubled due to higher staff costs, increased credit loss allowances, and a substantial impairment charge. Despite these losses, the company expanded its balance sheet through the acquisition of Jingxing Holdings Limited and is strategically shifting towards medium- and large-scale projects and cold chain operations to stabilize future revenue and margins.
